summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated artifact reports no security-sensitive job refs. No shared canonical is selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Closed candidate PRs are kept closed; open candidate PRs remain non-mutating classifications because merge, fix, raise_pr, and low-signal closeout are disabled or blocked by proof/review/maintainer gates.
